domain_entity.brief: A logical grouping of workunits forming a financial computation batch.
domain_entity.description:
Tracks the lifecycle of a collection of workunits that together constitute a
financial computation (e.g., a risk report run). The Assimilator monitors
batch completion to trigger downstream report generation.

primary_key.description: UUID primary key for the batch.

natural_keys.description: External reference linking this batch to the originating finance system or project.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Lifecycle status: open, processing, assimilating, or closed.
